{
  "1:LEN": {
    "1:I64": 4845634861506629183
  },
  "2:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "6:VARINT": 4,
  "7:LEN": [
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Unit tests for flow keying, directionality, byte accounting.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport pytest\r\nfrom netprof.parsers.flow_tracker import (\r\n    _normalize_key,\r\n    FlowTracker,\r\n)\r\nfrom netprof.correlation import compute_flow_id\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_flow_key_normalization():\r\n    \"\"\"Same flow from either direction yields same key.\"\"\"\r\n    a = _normalize_key(\"192.168.1.100\", 45000, \"192.168.1.1\", 80)\r\n    b = _normalize_key(\"192.168.1.1\", 80, \"192.168.1.100\", 45000)\r\n    assert a == b\r\n    assert a == (( \"192.168.1.1\", 80), (\"192.168.1.100\", 45000))\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_flow_id_stable():\r\n    \"\"\"flow_id is deterministic for same 5-tuple and capture_file_id.\"\"\"\r\n    id1 = compute_flow_id(\"192.168.1.100\", 45000, \"192.168.1.1\", 80, 6, \"file.pcap\")\r\n    id2 = compute_flow_id(\"192.168.1.100\", 45000, \"192.168.1.1\", 80, 6, \"file.pcap\")\r\n    assert id1 == id2\r\n    id3 = compute_flow_id(\"192.168.1.1\", 80, \"192.168.1.100\", 45000, 6, \"file.pcap\")\r\n    assert id1 == id3\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_byte_accounting():\r\n    \"\"\"FlowTracker counts bytes per direction correctly.\"\"\"\r\n    tracker = FlowTracker(capture_file_id=\"test\", flow_idle_timeout_sec=300)\r\n    # SYN from client\r\n    list(tracker.ingest(1000.0, \"192.168.1.100\", \"192.168.1.1\", 45000, 80, 6, b\"\", 1000, 0x02))\r\n    # SYN-ACK from server\r\n    list(tracker.ingest(1000.01, \"192.168.1.1\", \"192.168.1.100\", 80, 45000, 6, b\"\", 2000, 0x12))\r\n    # ACK from client\r\n    list(tracker.ingest(1000.02, \"192.168.1.100\", \"192.168.1.1\", 45000, 80, 6, b\"\", 1001, 0x10))\r\n    # Data client -> server (10 bytes)\r\n    out = list(tracker.ingest(1000.03, \"192.168.1.100\", \"192.168.1.1\", 45000, 80, 6, b\"1234567890\", 1001, 0x18))\r\n    assert len(out) == 0\r\n    # Data server -> client (5 bytes) + FIN server\r\n    out = list(tracker.ingest(1000.04, \"192.168.1.1\", \"192.168.1.100\", 80, 45000, 6, b\"hello\", 2001, 0x11))\r\n    assert len(out) == 0\r\n    # FIN client\r\n    out = list(tracker.ingest(1000.05, \"192.168.1.100\", \"192.168.1.1\", 45000, 80, 6, b\"\", 1011, 0x11))\r\n    assert len(out) == 1\r\n    flow, segments = out[0]\r\n    assert flow.bytes_client_to_server == 10\r\n    assert flow.bytes_server_to_client == 5\r\n    assert flow.client_ip == \"192.168.1.100\"\r\n    assert flow.server_ip == \"192.168.1.1\"\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "43a9fc339ed3327cbbf8add0f0ab630443e567a01b3a86f92bdb69e95b57e158",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Pytest configuration and shared fixtures.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport pytest\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\n\r\\REDACTED\r\ndef fixtures_dir(tmp_path: Path) -> Path:\r\n    \"\"\"Return a temporary directory; tests that need generated fixtures call fixtures generate first.\"\"\"\r\n    return tmp_path\r\n\r\n\r\\REDACTED\r\ndef sample_flow_tuple():\r\n    \"\"\"Canonical 5-tuple for flow keying tests.\"\"\"\r\n    return (\"192.168.1.100\", 45000, \"192.168.1.1\", 80)\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "3f4849f69005d8d7d077f4789fcbce940dd843bd37ca16112cd687c9e42e1ab1",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Unit tests for HTTP/2 stream extraction.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport pytest\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.http2 import HTTP2Handler, HTTP2_CLIENT_PREFACE, PREFACE_LEN\r\nfrom netprof.correlation import compute_txn_id_http2\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_http2_detect():\r\n    h = HTTP2Handler()\r\n    assert h.detect(HTTP2_CLIENT_PREFACE + b\"\\x00\\x00\\x00\\x04\\x00\\x00\\x00\\x00\\x00\", b\"\") is True\r\n    assert h.detect(b\"GET / HTTP/1.1\\r\\n\", b\"\") is False\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_http2_parse_minimal():\r\n    \"\"\"Minimal HTTP/2: preface + SETTINGS + HEADERS request + HEADERS response (synthetic).\"\"\"\r\n    try:\r\n        import hpack\r\n        from hyperframe.frame import Frame, HeadersFrame\r\n        encoder = hpack.Encoder()\r\n        req_headers = encoder.encode([\r\n            (\":method\", \"GET\"), (\":path\", \"/\"), (\":scheme\", \"https\"), (\":authority\", \"example.com\")\r\n        ])\r\n        # Build minimal c2s: preface + SETTINGS(0) + HEADERS(stream 1)\r\n        settings = bytes([0, 0, 0, 4, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0])\r\n        L = len(req_headers)\r\n        hdr_frame = bytes([L >> 16 & 0xFF, L >> 8 & 0xFF, L & 0xFF, 1, 5, 0, 0, 0, 1]) + req_headers\r\n        c2s = HTTP2_CLIENT_PREFACE + settings + hdr_frame\r\n        # Server: HEADERS stream 1 :status 200\r\n        enc2 = hpack.Encoder()\r\n        resp_headers = enc2.encode([(\":status\", \"200\")])\r\n        L2 = len(resp_headers)\r\n        s2c = bytes([L2 >> 16 & 0xFF, L2 >> 8 & 0xFF, L2 & 0xFF, 1, 4, 0, 0, 0, 1]) + resp_headers\r\n        h = HTTP2Handler()\r\n        txns = h.parse(c2s, s2c, \"flow1\", [(0, 1000.0)], [(0, 1000.02)])\r\n        assert len(txns) >= 1\r\n        t = txns[0]\r\n        assert t.stream_id == 1\r\n        assert t.flow_id == \"flow1\"\r\n        assert t.txn_id == compute_txn_id_http2(\"flow1\", 1)\r\n        assert t.method == \"GET\"\r\n        assert t.path == \"/\"\r\n        assert t.status_code == 200\r\n    except ImportError:\r\n        pytest.skip(\"h2/hpack/hyperframe required\")\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "f32127e24560f381db380b6ef7eb4ef6a9e866d21f1735f27283977c980e24df",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Integration test: run netprof analyze on fixtures and assert outputs.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport json\r\nimport subprocess\r\nimport sys\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\nimport pytest\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _run_netprof_fixtures_generate(out_dir: Path) -> None:\r\n    subprocess.run(\r\n        [sys.executable, \"-m\", \"netprof.cli.main\", \"fixtures\", \"generate\", \"--output\", str(out_dir)],\r\n        check=True,\r\n        capture_output=True,\r\n        cwd=Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent,\r\n    )\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _run_netprof_analyze(pcap_path: Path, out_dir: Path) -> None:\r\n    subprocess.run(\r\n        [sys.executable, \"-m\", \"netprof.cli.main\", \"analyze\", str(pcap_path), \"--out\", str(out_dir)],\r\n        check=True,\r\n        capture_output=True,\r\n        cwd=Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent,\r\n    )\r\n\r\n\r\\REDACTED(\r\n    not Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent.joinpath(\"netprof\").exists(),\r\n    reason=\"netprof package not installed\",\r\n)\r\ndef test_analyze_fixtures_integration(tmp_path: Path):\r\n    \"\"\"Generate fixtures, run analyze, assert summary and transactions counts.\"\"\"\r\n    fixtures_dir = tmp_path / \"fixtures\"\r\n    out_dir = tmp_path / \"out\"\r\n    _run_netprof_fixtures_generate(fixtures_dir)\r\n    http1_pcap = fixtures_dir / \"http1_keepalive.pcap\"\r\n    http2_pcap = fixtures_dir / \"http2_minimal.pcap\"\r\n    assert http1_pcap.exists(), \"http1_keepalive.pcap should exist\"\r\n    assert http2_pcap.exists(), \"http2_minimal.pcap should exist\"\r\n    _run_netprof_analyze(fixtures_dir, out_dir)\r\n    summary_path = out_dir / \"summary.json\"\r\n    assert summary_path.exists()\r\n    with open(summary_path, encoding=\"utf-8\") as REDACTED        summary = json.load(f)\r\n    assert summary[\"total_flows\"] == 2\r\n    assert summary[\"total_transactions\"] >= 2  # at least 2 HTTP/1.1 + 1 HTTP/2\r\n    txns_path = out_dir / \"transactions.jsonl\"\r\n    assert txns_path.exists()\r\n    lines = [ln for ln in open(txns_path, encoding=\"utf-8\") if ln.strip()]\r\n    assert len(lines) >= 2\r\n    txn1 = json.loads(lines[0])\r\n    assert \"txn_id\" in txn1\r\n    assert \"flow_id\" in txn1\r\n    assert \"path\" in txn1 or \"method\" in txn1\r\n    flows_path = out_dir / \"flows.jsonl\"\r\n    assert flows_path.exists()\r\n    flow_lines = [ln for ln in open(flows_path, encoding=\"utf-8\") if ln.strip()]\r\n    assert len(flow_lines) == 2\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "5e6fde19240be8cf6593f342c6d7f59116d7c7f2490b043a70779857e9b973de",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    }
  ]
}

http:requestBodyJSON is %257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253AI64%2522%253A4845634861506629183%257D%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%252C%25226%253AVARINT%2522%253A4%252C%25227%253ALEN%2522%253A%255B%257B%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522.%255C%255CAer_J1EHDqJlae-H4TQ%255C%255CNAivCrAJUF1uurQkRoJbBVglEDC6vJbITKk.MO9Sj9b9qRD9MQ%2522%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522%255C%2522%255C%2522%255C%2522Unit%2Btests%2Bfor%2Bflow%2Bkeying%252C%2Bdirectionality%252C%2Bbyte%2Baccounting.%255C%2522%255C%2522%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cnimport%2Bpytest%255Cr%255Cnfrom%2Bnetprof.parsers.flow_tracker%2Bimport%2B%2528%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B_normalize_key%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2BFlowTracker%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2529%255Cr%255Cnfrom%2Bnetprof.correlation%2Bimport%2Bcompute_flow_id%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cndef%2Btest_flow_key_normalization%2528%2529%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%255C%2522%255C%2522%255C%2522Same%2Bflow%2Bfrom%2Beither%2Bdirection%2Byields%2Bsame%2Bkey.%255C%2522%255C%2522%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Ba%2B%3D%2B_normalize_key%2528%255C%2522192.168.1.100%255C%2522%252C%2B45000%252C%2B%255C%2522192.168.1.1%255C%2522%252C%2B80%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bb%2B%253D%2B_normalize_key%2528%255C%2522192.168.1.1%255C%2522%252C%2B80%252C%2B%255C%2522192.168.1.100%255C%2522%252C%2B45000%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Ba%2B%253D%253D%2Bb%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Ba%2B%253D%253D%2B%2528%2528%2B%255C%2522192.168.1.1%255C%2522%252C%2B80%2529%252C%2B%2528%255C%2522192.168.1.100%255C%2522%252C%2B45000%2529%2529%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cndef%2Btest_flow_id_stable%2528%2529%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%255C%2522%255C%2522%255C%2522flow_id%2Bis%2Bdeterministic%2Bfor%2Bsame%2B5-tuple%2Band%2Bcapture_file_id.%255C%2522%255C%2522%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bid1%2B%253D%2Bcompute_flow_id%2528%255C%2522192.168.1.100%255C%2522%252C%2B45000%252C%2B%255C%2522192.168.1.1%255C%2522%252C%2B80%252C%2B6%252C%2B%255C%2522file.pcap%255C%2522%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bid2%2B%253D%2Bcompute_flow_id%2528%255C%2522192.168.1.100%255C%2522%252C%2B45000%252C%2B%255C%2522192.168.1.1%255C%2522%252C%2B80%252C%2B6%252C%2B%255C%2522file.pcap%255C%2522%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bid1%2B%253D%253D%2Bid2%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bid3%2B%253D%2Bcompute_flow_id%2528%255C%2522192.168.1.1%255C%2522%252C%2B80%252C%2B%255C%2522192.168.1.100%255C%2522%252C%2B45000%252C%2B6%252C%2B%255C%2522file.pcap%255C%2522%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bid1%2B%253D%253D%2Bid3%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cndef%2Btest_byte_accounting%2528%2529%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%255C%2522%255C%2522%255C%2522FlowTracker%2Bcounts%2Bbytes%2Bper%2Bdirection%2Bcorrectly.%255C%2522%255C%2522%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Btracker%2B%253D%2BFlowTracker%2528capture_file_id%253D%255C%2522test%255C%2522%252C%2Bflow_idle_timeout_sec%253D300%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2523%2BSYN%2Bfrom%2Bclient%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Blist%2528tracker.ingest%25281000.0%252C%2B%255C%2522192.168.1.100%255C%2522%252C%2B%255C%2522192.168.1.1%255C%2522%252C%2B45000%252C%2B80%252C%2B6%252C%2Bb%255C%2522%255C%2522%252C%2B1000%252C%2B0x02%2529%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2523%2BSYN-ACK%2Bfrom%2Bserver%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Blist%2528tracker.ingest%25281000.01%252C%2B%255C%2522192.168.1.1%255C%2522%252C%2B%255C%2522192.168.1.100%255C%2522%252C%2B80%252C%2B45000%252C%2B6%252C%2Bb%255C%2522%255C%2522%252C%2B2000%252C%2B0x12%2529%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2523%2BACK%2Bfrom%2Bclient%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Blist%2528tracker.ingest%25281000.02%252C%2B%255C%2522192.168.1.100%255C%2522%252C%2B%255C%2522192.168.1.1%255C%2522%252C%2B45000%252C%2B80%252C%2B6%252C%2Bb%255C%2522%255C%2522%252C%2B1001%252C%2B0x10%2529%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2523%2BData%2Bclient%2B-%255Cu003e%2Bserver%2B%252810%2Bbytes%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bout%2B%253D%2Blist%2528tracker.ingest%25281000.03%252C%2B%255C%2522192.168.1.100%255C%2522%252C%2B%255C%2522192.168.1.1%255C%2522%252C%2B45000%252C%2B80%252C%2B6%252C%2Bb%255C%25221234567890%255C%2522%252C%2B1001%252C%2B0x18%2529%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Blen%2528out%2529%2B%253D%253D%2B0%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2523%2BData%2Bserver%2B-%255Cu003e%2Bclient%2B%25285%2Bbytes%2529%2B%2B%2BFIN%2Bserver%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bout%2B%253D%2Blist%2528tracker.ingest%25281000.04%252C%2B%255C%2522192.168.1.1%255C%2522%252C%2B%255C%2522192.168.1.100%255C%2522%252C%2B80%252C%2B45000%252C%2B6%252C%2Bb%255C%2522hello%255C%2522%252C%2B2001%252C%2B0x11%2529%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Blen%2528out%2529%2B%253D%253D%2B0%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2523%2BFIN%2Bclient%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bout%2B%253D%2Blist%2528tracker.ingest%25281000.05%252C%2B%255C%2522192.168.1.100%255C%2522%252C%2B%255C%2522192.168.1.1%255C%2522%252C%2B45000%252C%2B80%252C%2B6%252C%2Bb%255C%2522%255C%2522%252C%2B1011%252C%2B0x11%2529%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Blen%2528out%2529%2B%253D%253D%2B1%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bflow%252C%2Bsegments%2B%253D%2Bout%255B0%255D%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bflow.bytes_client_to_server%2B%253D%253D%2B10%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bflow.bytes_server_to_client%2B%253D%253D%2B5%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bflow.client_ip%2B%253D%253D%2B%255C%2522192.168.1.100%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bflow.server_ip%2B%253D%253D%2B%255C%2522192.168.1.1%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%2522%257D%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%252243a9fc339ed3327cbbf8add0f0ab630443e567a01b3a86f92bdb69e95b57e158%2522%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%255B%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522.%255C%255CAer_J1EHDqJlae-H4TQ%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522.%2522%257D%255D%252C%25224%253AVARINT%2522%253A1%257D%252C%257B%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522%255C%2522%255C%2522%255C%2522Pytest%2Bconfiguration%2Band%2Bshared%2Bfixtures.%255C%25 6d21f1735f27283977c980e24df%2522%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%255B%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522.%255C%255CAer_J1EHDqJlae-H4TQ%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522.%2522%257D%255D%252C%25224%253AVARINT%2522%253A1%257D%252C%257B%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522%255C%2522%255C%2522%255C%2522Integration%2Btest%253A%2Brun%2Bnetprof%2Banalyze%2Bon%2Bfixtures%2Band%2Bassert%2Boutputs.%255C%2522%255C%2522%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cnimport%2Bjson%255Cr%255Cnimport%2Bsubprocess%255Cr%255Cnimport%2Bsys%255Cr%255Cnfrom%2Bpathlib%2Bimport%2BPath%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cnimport%2Bpytest%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cndef%2B_run_netprof_fixtures_generate%2528out_dir%253A%2BPath%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2BNone%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bsubprocess.run%2528%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%255Bsys.executable%252C%2B%255C%2522-m%255C%2522%252C%2B%255C%2522netprof.cli.main%255C%2522%252C%2B%255C%2522fixtures%255C%2522%252C%2B%255C%2522generate%255C%2522%252C%2B%255C%2522--output%255C%2522%252C%2Bstr%2528out_dir%2529%255D%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bcheck%253DTrue%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bcapture_output%253DTrue%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bcwd%253DPath%2528__file__%2529.resolve%2528%2529.parent.parent%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2529%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cndef%2B_run_netprof_analyze%2528pcap_path%253A%2BPath%252C%2Bout_dir%253A%2BPath%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2BNone%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bsubprocess.run%2528%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%255Bsys.executable%252C%2B%255C%2522-m%255C%2522%252C%2B%255C%2522netprof.cli.main%255C%2522%252C%2B%255C%2522analyze%255C%2522%252C%2Bstr%2528pcap_path%2529%252C%2B%255C%2522--out%255C%2522%252C%2Bstr%2528out_dir%2529%255D%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bcheck%253DTrue%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bcapture_output%253DTrue%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bcwd%253DPath%2528__file__%2529.resolve%2528%2529.parent.parent%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2529%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255CREDACTED%2528%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bnot%2BPath%2528__file__%2529.resolve%2528%2529.parent.parent.joinpath%2528%255C%2522netprof%255C%2522%2529.exists%2528%2529%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Breason%253D%255C%2522netprof%2Bpackage%2Bnot%2Binstalled%255C%2522%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2529%255Cr%255Cndef%2Btest_analyze_fixtures_integration%2528tmp_path%253A%2BPath%2529%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%255C%2522%255C%2522%255C%2522Generate%2Bfixtures%252C%2Brun%2Banalyze%252C%2Bassert%2Bsummary%2Band%2Btransactions%2Bcounts.%255C%2522%255C%2522%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bfixtures_dir%2B%253D%2Btmp_path%2B%252F%2B%255C%2522fixtures%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bout_dir%2B%253D%2Btmp_path%2B%252F%2B%255C%2522out%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B_run_netprof_fixtures_generate%2528fixtures_dir%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bhttp1_pcap%2B%253D%2Bfixtures_dir%2B%252F%2B%255C%2522http1_keepalive.pcap%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bhttp2_pcap%2B%253D%2Bfixtures_dir%2B%252F%2B%255C%2522http2_minimal.pcap%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bhttp1_pcap.exists%2528%2529%252C%2B%255C%2522http1_keepalive.pcap%2Bshould%2Bexist%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bhttp2_pcap.exists%2528%2529%252C%2B%255C%2522http2_minimal.pcap%2Bshould%2Bexist%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B_run_netprof_analyze%2528fixtures_dir%252C%2Bout_dir%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bsummary_path%2B%253D%2Bout_dir%2B%252F%2B%255C%2522summary.json%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bsummary_path.exists%2528%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bwith%2Bopen%2528summary_path%252C%2Bencoding%253D%255C%2522utf-8%255C%2522%2529%2Bas%2BREDACTED%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bsummary%2B%253D%2Bjson.load%2528f%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bsummary%255B%255C%2522total_flows%255C%2522%255D%2B%253D%253D%2B2%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bsummary%255B%255C%2522total_transactions%255C%2522%255D%2B%255Cu003e%253D%2B2%2B%2B%2523%2Bat%2Bleast%2B2%2BHTTP%252F1.1%2B%2B%2B1%2BHTTP%252F2%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Btxns_path%2B%253D%2Bout_dir%2B%252F%2B%255C%2522transactions.jsonl%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Btxns_path.exists%2528%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Blines%2B%253D%2B%255Bln%2Bfor%2Bln%2Bin%2Bopen%2528txns_path%252C%2Bencoding%253D%255C%2522utf-8%255C%2522%2529%2Bif%2Bln.strip%2528%2529%255D%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Blen%2528lines%2529%2B%255Cu003e%253D%2B2%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Btxn1%2B%253D%2Bjson.loads%2528lines%255B0%255D%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2B%255C%2522txn_id%255C%2522%2Bin%2Btxn1%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2B%255C%2522flow_id%255C%2522%2Bin%2Btxn1%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2B%255C%2522path%255C%2522%2Bin%2Btxn1%2Bor%2B%255C%2522method%255C%2522%2Bin%2Btxn1%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bflows_path%2B%253D%2Bout_dir%2B%252F%2B%255C%2522flows.jsonl%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bflows_path.exists%2528%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bflow_lines%2B%253D%2B%255Bln%2Bfor%2Bln%2Bin%2Bopen%2528flows_path%252C%2Bencoding%253D%255C%2522utf-8%255C%2522%2529%2Bif%2Bln.strip%2528%2529%255D%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Blen%2528flow_lines%2529%2B%253D%253D%2B2%255Cr%255Cn%2522%257D%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%25225e6fde19240be8cf6593f342c6d7f59116d7c7f2490b043a70779857e9b973de%2522%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%255B%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522.%255C%255CAer_J1EHDqJlae-H4TQ%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522.%2522%257D%255D%252C%25224%253AVARINT%2522%253A1%257D%255D%257D
